Preview

Happy Birthday!

[Enter Birthday Message]

[Enter Birthday Achievement]

<section aria-label="Birthday Celebration" style="max-width:800px;margin:0 auto;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:#202122;line-height:1.45;">

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://s.brightspace.com/lib/fonts/0.6.1/fonts.css">
</head>
<body style="color: rgb(32, 33, 34); font-family: Lato, sans-serif; font-size: 12px;">
  <section aria-label="Birthday Celebration" style="max-width: 800px; margin: 0 auto; font-family: Arial,sans-serif; color: #202122; line-height: 1.45;">
  <div style="border-left: 8px solid #cb4900; background: #fff7f0; padding: 12px 14px; border-radius: 12px; margin-bottom: 14px;">
  <h1 style="margin: 0 0 4px 0; font-size: 1.2rem; color: #cb4900;">
    <span style="font-family: Lato, sans-serif; font-size: 32px;">Happy Birthday!</span>
  </h1>
  <p style="margin: 0; opacity: .9;">
    <span style="font-size: 20px;">[Enter Birthday Message]</span>
  </p>
  </div>
  <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 12px; position: relative; overflow: hidden; min-height: 300px;"><!-- Cake --> <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="200" height="200" viewBox="0 0 200 200" role="img" aria-label="Birthday cake" style="z-index: 2;">
        <g>
          <animateTransform attributeName="transform" type="translate" values="0 0; 0 -8; 0 0" dur="3s" repeatCount="indefinite"></animateTransform>
          <ellipse cx="100" cy="170" rx="70" ry="10" fill="#e7e7e7" opacity=".6"></ellipse>
          <rect x="50" y="110" width="100" height="45" rx="12" fill="#ffd6c2" stroke="rgba(203,73,0,0.25)" stroke-width="2"></rect>
          <rect x="60" y="80" width="80" height="35" rx="10" fill="#ffe7dc" stroke="rgba(203,73,0,0.2)" stroke-width="2"></rect>
          <path d="M60 80 C70 90, 75 90, 80 80 C90 92, 95 92, 100 80 C110 92, 115 92, 120 80 C130 90, 135 90, 140 80 L140 90 L60 90 Z" fill="#ffffff"></path>
          <rect x="95" y="48" width="10" height="32" rx="4" fill="#cb4900"></rect>
          <rect x="97" y="48" width="2" height="32" fill="#ffb98d"></rect>
          <rect x="101" y="48" width="2" height="32" fill="#ffb98d"></rect>
          <ellipse cx="100" cy="40" rx="7" ry="10" fill="#ff9a3c"></ellipse>
          <ellipse cx="100" cy="38" rx="3" ry="5" fill="#fff7b5"></ellipse>
          <rect x="75" y="95" width="10" height="3" rx="2" fill="#6aa9ff" transform="rotate(10 75 95)"></rect>
          <rect x="105" y="100" width="10" height="3" rx="2" fill="#6bd48c" transform="rotate(-12 105 100)"></rect>
          <rect x="120" y="95" width="10" height="3" rx="2" fill="#f5c34d" transform="rotate(15 120 95)"></rect>
        </g>
      </svg> <button id="confettiBtn" type="button" style="cursor: pointer; border: 1px solid #cb4900; background: #cb4900; color: #fff; padding: 10px 14px; border-radius: 12px; font-weight: bold; z-index: 2;"> Throw Confetti </button>
      <p style="max-width: 60ch; text-align: center; opacity: .9; margin: 0; z-index: 2;"><span style="font-size: 20px;">[Enter Birthday Achievement]</span></p>
      <!-- Confetti container -->
      <div id="confettiArea" aria-hidden="true" style="position: absolute; inset: 0; pointer-events: none; overflow: hidden; z-index: 1;></div>
    </div>
    <script>
      (function () {
        const btn = document.getElementById("confettiBtn");
        const area = document.getElementById("confettiArea");
        function makeConfettiPiece(left, delay, duration, color, rotate) {
          const piece = document.createElement("div");
          piece.style.position = "absolute";
          piece.style.top = "-20px";
          piece.style.left = left + "%";
          piece.style.width = "10px";
          piece.style.height = "14px";
          piece.style.background = color;
          piece.style.opacity = "0.95";
          piece.style.transform = "rotate(" + rotate + "deg)";
          piece.style.borderRadius = "2px";
          piece.style.transition = "transform " + duration + "ms linear, top " + duration + "ms linear, opacity " + duration + "ms ease-out";
          piece.style.transitionDelay = delay + "ms";
          area.appendChild(piece);
          requestAnimationFrame(() => {
            piece.style.top = "280px";
            piece.style.transform = "translateX(" + ((Math.random() * 80) - 40) + "px) rotate(" + (rotate + 360) + "deg)";
            piece.style.opacity = "0.2";
          });
          setTimeout(() => piece.remove(), duration + delay + 100);
        }
        btn.addEventListener("click", function () {
          const colors = ["#cb4900", "#6aa9ff", "#6bd48c", "#f5c34d", "#ff7aa2", "#a78bfa"];
          for (let i = 0; i < 45; i++) {
            makeConfettiPiece(Math.random() * 100, Math.random() * 250, 1800 + Math.random() * 1200, colors[Math.floor(Math.random() * colors.length)], Math.random() * 180);
          }
        });
      })();
    </script>
</section>

← Back to catalog

}); setTimeout(() => piece.remove(), duration + delay + 100); } btn.addEventListener("click", function () { const colors = ["#cb4900", "#6aa9ff", "#6bd48c", "#f5c34d", "#ff7aa2", "#a78bfa"]; for (let i = 0; i < 45; i++) { makeConfettiPiece( Math.random() * 100, Math.random() * 250, 1800 + Math.random() * 1200, colors[Math.floor(Math.random() * colors.length)], Math.random() * 180 ); } }); })(); </section>
